reply:
[[BLOCK:p_31]]
Demonstrate an integrated understanding of selected content areas within psychology, with appropriate breadth and depth.

[[BLOCK:p_32]]
Apply the core concepts, terminology, and major theories of psychology to explain psychological phenomena.

[[BLOCK:p_33]]
Describe, compare, and evaluate the major theoretical perspectives in psychology, including behaviorism (行为主义), biological, cognitive, evolutionary, humanism (人本主义), psychoanalysis (精神分析), and sociocultural approaches.

[[BLOCK:p_34]]
Employ critical thinking skills effectively.

[[BLOCK:p_37]]
Textbook: *What Is Psychology?* by Ellen E. Pastorino. China Renmin University Press (中国人民大学出版社).
